## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

1. Call endpoint `GET /api/...`
2. With headers / body: `...`
3. Observe the error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or HTTP status codes.

## 🌍 Environment

| Field | Value |
| :--- | :--- |
| **OS** | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 |
| **.NET Version** | e.g. 8.0.x |
| **Running via** | Docker / `dotnet run` |
| **API Version / Commit** | e.g. `main@abc1234` |

## 📎 Logs / Screenshots

```
Paste relevant log output or error stack trace here.
```

## 💡 Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (e.g. only occurs on specific input, intermittent, etc.).
